notes: Each eval drives the axon4to5-migrate Skill with the query-gateway recipe in single mode. Coverage: REST controller import-only (Class<R> overload already used), ResponseType wrapper removal + queryMany, sync callback bare-.get()-to-orTimeout, rejected handler class with QueryGateway field.

evals.name: spring-rest-import-only
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. DwellingRestController is a Spring @RestController. It imports AF4 QueryGateway (org.axonframework.queryhandling.QueryGateway) and calls `queryGateway.query(new GetDwellingById(dwellingId), DwellingReadModel.class)` — already using the Class<R> overload. Apply the query-gateway recipe: (1) swap the QueryGateway import to AF5 (org.axonframework.messaging.queryhandling.gateway.QueryGateway). Body, field, constructor, return type, and method signature stay identical. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: AF5 QueryGateway import; body unchanged; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-query-gateway

evals.name: spring-rest-response-type-removal
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. BikeStatusController is a Spring @RestController. It uses `ResponseTypes.instanceOf(BikeStatus.class)` for a single-response query and `ResponseTypes.multipleInstancesOf(BikeStatus.class)` for a multi-response query. Apply the query-gateway recipe per use-case 03: (1) swap QueryGateway import to AF5, (2) replace ResponseTypes.instanceOf(BikeStatus.class) with BikeStatus.class, (3) replace query(..., ResponseTypes.multipleInstancesOf(BikeStatus.class)) with queryMany(..., BikeStatus.class), (4) remove the ResponseTypes import. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: AF5 QueryGateway import; ResponseTypes wrappers removed; queryMany used for multi-response; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-query-gateway

evals.name: blocking-get-to-async-upgrade
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. DwellingsQueryService is a @Component with method `getDwelling(String dwellingId)` that returns `DwellingReadModel` and calls `queryGateway.query(new GetDwellingById(dwellingId), DwellingReadModel.class).get()` (bare blocking call). The method is a plain service method with no sync contract constraint. Apply the query-gateway recipe per use-case 02 Path A (preferred): (1) swap QueryGateway import to AF5, (2) change method return type from `DwellingReadModel` to `CompletableFuture<DwellingReadModel>`, (3) simplify the body to `return queryGateway.query(new GetDwellingById(dwellingId), DwellingReadModel.class)` (no .get(), no try-catch), (4) add `import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture`. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: AF5 QueryGateway import; method return type upgraded to CompletableFuture<DwellingReadModel>; body returns future directly; no .get(); CompletableFuture import added; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-query-gateway

assertions.text: Method return type upgraded to CompletableFuture<DwellingReadModel>

evals.name: spring-handler-rejected
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. QueryGatewayInHandlerClass has an @EventHandler method AND injects QueryGateway as a class-level field. The query-gateway recipe's Applicable predicate 2 must reject (route to event-processor recipe). The source MUST stay byte-identical — no AF5 QueryGateway import, no changes to @ProcessingGroup, no changes to @EventHandler. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Handler class rejected; source untouched; Result: ⏭️ Rejected with NOTES naming event-processor recipe.
expectations: Notes name event-processor recipe as routing target
Source untouched: AF4 QueryGateway import still present
No AF5 QueryGateway import swapped in

assertions.text: Notes name event-processor as routing target
Source untouched: AF4 QueryGateway import still present
No AF5 QueryGateway import swapped in
